header: Pick what you buy. The software stays free.
subheadline: Four ways to work with the creators — from a €0 license to the team that built all 255 elements running your site for you.

items.title: Licenses
items.description: Community is free forever under GPL-2.0. Pro (€49/mo) and Agency (€149/mo) add guarantees, priority support, and early access — yearly billing saves 2 months.

items.title: Setup & adaptation
items.description: Installation for €890, brand-adapted theme presets from €1,990, custom elements from €390 — set up by the people who built it. Ship in days, not weeks.

items.title: Hosting
items.description: Managed TYPO3 hosting with updates, daily backups, and monitoring in an EU datacenter. Business at €179/mo adds staging, a 99.9% SLA, and CDN.

items.title: Care retainer
items.description: Creator Care: 4 dev hours every month, priority fixes, security monitoring, and LTS upgrade planning — straight from the maintainers.
